channel.title: Debjeet Swain
channel.description: Product, systems, and cleaner living. Notes from a builder PM working in billing, CPQ, and AI workflows.

item.title: Postcard Desk — a daily desk for inbound work
item.description: One desk that pulls Slack, PRs, Jira, calendar, and docs into postcards I can triage in the first 90 minutes of the day. Local-first. Drafts replies via headless Claude with a tight allowlist.

item.title: PM Dojo — a sparring arena for PM craft
item.description: A practice gym for the messy, real moments PMs face: Inbox Fire, Red Pen, First Principles, The Room. Built on a wiki of Shreyas Doshi, Wes Kao, April Dunford, and 250+ other sources.

item.title: Wonder Journal — a thinking-tool for kids
item.description: A journal that prompts curiosity instead of recording it. Built for my daughter, designed to scale.

item.title: Build — what I'm shipping right now
item.description: Current projects, current bets. Updated as I ship.

item.title: Stack — what I use and why
item.description: My toolchain for product work, AI workflows, and writing. Opinionated. Stable. Tuned over years.
